settings.title: We Are Launching Small Group Strength Classes
settings.excerpt: Capped at four people per session, these classes give you coaching attention without the one to one price.
settings.body:
Plenty of people want real coaching but find one to one training out of reach. Starting this month, Ironform is running small group strength sessions capped at four people.

Each block runs for eight weeks and follows a proper progression, not a random workout of the day. You learn the main lifts, build them week over week, and we keep an eye on every rep.

Because the groups are tiny, you still get hands on correction. The cost per session is roughly half of private training.

The first block starts the second week of February. Message us to claim one of the spots.
